nextStep: Record a Loom walking through the audit questions below, then drop the link in Files & Links. ~15 min.
audit: What does your current lead flow look like end-to-end?
Which tasks eat the most of your team's time each week?
What tools are you using today (CRM, email, scheduling, etc.)?
Where do leads or clients most often drop off?
What would "this worked" look like 90 days from now?
Any tools or workflows that are off-limits to change?

calls.name: Kickoff Call
calls.summary: Walked through goals, current stack, and the scope of the audit.
